title: Chevron Nodes 4
description: A digital circuit board or technical schematic visualization with a dark, deep navy background (#050c17). The composition features a layered grid system with multiple scales: a fine micro-grid in dark blue (#011c3b) at 91% opacity creating subtle texture, overlaid with a coarser macro-grid in bright blue (#485ed4) forming larger rectangular sections. The grids are distorted by a wave effect at 326 degrees with square waveform characteristics, creating organic undulation and ripple patterns across the geometric structure. A grid distortion effect with radius 2.8 and decay of 3 adds localized warping and bulging to the grid intersections. White dithering with bayer2 pattern (9px pixel size, 69% threshold) applied via screen blend mode creates a grainy, scanline-like texture throughout, simulating digital noise and CRT monitor artifacts. A strong glow effect (intensity 4.8, size 20) illuminates the bright blue grid lines and dithered white elements, creating a luminous halo and bloom effect. The overall aesthetic is cyberpunk/tech-noir with a sense of depth, movement, and digital energy. Vertical and horizontal lines show varying intensity with some appearing as dashed segments, suggesting circuit traces or data flow paths.
